further_reading.title: AI and ML perspective: Cost optimization
further_reading.why_relevant: Covers how to measure training, inference, storage, and operational costs for AI/ML workloads and compare them against business value.

further_reading.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework: Cost Optimization Pillar
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a general framework for tracking usage, optimizing resources over time, and avoiding cost decisions based on guesswork.

further_reading.title: Design storage for AI and ML workloads in Google Cloud
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful background for the module's storage-growth discussion, especially lifecycle planning across training, serving, and archiving.

notes: No inline citation candidates were identified in the prose body. The module is mostly operational guidance and heuristic decision-making without dated statistics, named incidents, version-specific vendor claims, or other hard factual assertions that require inline citations under the pipeline rules. Quiz items and exercise steps were excluded per instructions.
